rag_rules: Fix type mismatches in AGREE binary expressions by ensuring left and right sides match in type.
Resolve 'named thing must be an expression with a type' errors by correcting unresolved identifiers or invalid helpers on the same line.
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in the same annex.
Ensure type consistency in AGREE equations and guarantees by matching declared types with expression types.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers in AGREE that are not present in the AADL model.
Place component type contracts in component type scopes and implementation bindings in implementation scopes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool for constants and equations.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports or implementation-only paths in component type annexes.
Do not introduce undefined or mismatched types in AGREE expressions without fixing the root cause.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair strategies
